titles.title: Keep Your Mind Stayed on Me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Restless heart, troubled mind I'm tryin' out to find Answers to what why'd turned out this way While my heart plead with fear I can feel Him draw near Gently I hear fine words say

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Keep your mind stayed on Me Stayed on Me faithfully And I will give you perfect peace Sweet release if you'll just Keep your mind stayed on Me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's evening time, the hour's late There's a pressure so great Everywhere hearts to fail cause of fear But when I think of lovely things Oh the peace is what brings His still small voice I can hear

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I give my mind Completely to You, Lord Fill me with Your thoughts, And make it all brand new Change my life Let me live in all that's true I just want to think like You
